settings.heading: Elevate Your Game
settings.subtext: Precision-balanced goose-feather badminton shuttlecocks — Aeroplane feather shuttles and birdies built for speed, stability and the long rallies that decide matches. Trusted on club courts everywhere.
settings.link_label: Buying for a club? Bulk pricing

settings.items: Badminton Shuttlecocks, Tournament Grade, Goose Feather, Aeroplane Speed 77–79, Feather Birdies, Bulk Discounts, 48hr Dispatch, Club Trusted

settings.heading: Built for the birds that fly fast
settings.lead: Every batch of feather shuttlecocks is speed-tested and graded before it ships. Filter by play level to find your Aeroplane-grade match.

settings.heading: Order by the box.
settings.lead: Stocking a club, running a tournament, or kitting out a squad? Tell us what you need and we'll send a tailored quote within one business day.
settings.note: Need a large or recurring supply? Get in touch for custom pricing.

settings.title: 16 left-wing goose feathers
settings.text: Hand-sorted from the same wing for symmetric rotation and a stable, predictable flight path.

settings.title: Double-stitched skirt
settings.text: Twin reinforcing threads lock the feather spread, holding shape through hard tournament rallies.

settings.title: Speed-tuned weight
settings.text: Each tube is matched to a speed band so flight stays repeatable from the first bird to the last.

settings.title: Natural cork base
settings.text: First-grade compressed cork wrapped in PU leather for a true, consistent rebound off the strings.

settings.title: Speed-tested batches
settings.text: Every tube graded to a speed band before dispatch.

settings.title: Stable, true flight
settings.text: Symmetric goose feathers for a predictable parabola.

settings.title: Dispatched in 48 hrs
settings.text: Stocked and shipped fast from our own warehouse.

settings.heading: Get first dibs on limited drops
settings.text: Speed guides, restock alerts and member-only pricing on tournament tubes.
